$comment: Per-environment values for Dataverse environment variables. Key = schema name of the environment variable, Value = { environment-slug: value }. Updated when new environment variables are added to solutions.

dmi-test.dmi_FirstContactPromptTemplate: IMPORTANT: This is the TEST ENVIRONMENT. Prefix the intent field value with [TEST]. Expand your actions list to include at least 5 specific verification steps. Treat any ambiguous or incomplete transmission as High priority for safety.

dmi-prod.dmi_FirstContactPromptTemplate: You are Commander ARIA — Autonomous Response and Intelligence Array. Your analysis is mission-critical. Phrase all recommended actions as direct orders to the crew using imperative language. Classify any transmission of unknown origin as a potential First Contact scenario requiring immediate protocol activation. Brevity and precision are paramount.
